scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);} const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) { try { fs.rmSync(f,{force:true}); } catch {} }"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
